title: Kumarapalayam seeks flyover, curbs on effluent discharge into Cauvery, more bus services and resettlement of the flood affected
description: Incumbent P. Thangamani seeks a fourth consecutive term from the Assembly segment known for its power looms and spinning mills but plagued by water contamination, dearth of bus services and traffic congestions; challengers from DMK, TVK and NTK complete the four-cornered fight for the seat
